name: Canning Fruit-Based Baby Foods
recipeIngredient: Any chunk-style or pureed fruit with or without sugar
Pack in half-pint, preferably, or pint jars
Refer to the processing times in Table 1 for proper canning
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not attempt to can vegetables, red meats, or poultry meats.
- Use standard processing procedures and puree or blend at serving time.
2. Heat blended foods to boiling.
3. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Cool the food thoroughly before serving.
5. Store unused portions in the refrigerator and use within 2 days for best quality.
Table 1:
Process times for fruit-based baby foods in a boiling-water canner (in minutes):
- Jar Size: Pints
- Elevation 0 - 1,000 ft: 20 min
- Elevation 1,001 - 6,000 ft: 25 min
- Elevation above 6,000 ft: 30 min
Note: USDA Agriculture Information Bulletin No. 539 (rev. 1994)
